ConfigurationTableDefinition.description: Contains user groups that have separate visibility permissions
ConfigurationTableDefinition.name: RestrictedRoles

ConfigurationTableDefinition.description: Contains all machine status with additional information
ConfigurationTableDefinition.name: StatusLegend

ConfigurationTable.description: Contains user groups that have separate visibility permissions
ConfigurationTable.name: RestrictedRoles

FieldDefinition.description: Groups where the restriction is taken into account (Separate with ,)
FieldDefinition.name: modules

ConfigurationTable.description: Contains all machine status with additional information
ConfigurationTable.name: StatusLegend

FieldDefinition.description: Manager entity of module. This is used to get metadata of the module like usergroups that have permissions to see the menu entry etc.
FieldDefinition.name: ModuleManager

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns configured database connector in configuration table.
ServiceDefinition.name: GetDatabaseConnector

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns JSON Object with calculated date-range
ServiceDefinition.name: GetDateRange

ServiceDefinition.description: Generate URL to handle user logout
ServiceDefinition.name: GetLogoutURL

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns entries for the navigation popup
ServiceDefinition.name: GetNavigationMenuEntries

FieldDefinition.description: the User to get the groups of
FieldDefinition.name: User

ServiceDefinition.description: Checks if the current user is part of the restriced groups, for which different UI parts are visible
ServiceDefinition.name: HasUserRestrictedRole

FieldDefinition.description: Checks table for second criteria in 'description'
FieldDefinition.name: validityScope

ServiceDefinition.description: Add all existing location permission roles to all existing module roles.
ServiceDefinition.name: InitializeRoles

ServiceDefinition.description: Loads image from Repository entity by machineName or path
ServiceDefinition.name: LoadFileRepositoryImage

Row.code: const result = me.GetConfigurationTable({ tableName: "DatabaseConnector" /* STRING */ }).name;
const result = "HPMC.DynamicData";
let result = me.serverRootUrl + "/FormLogin/HPMC.Voestalpine.Orga";
const result = "HPMC.Voestalpine.Orga";
const extension = Resources["CurrentSessionInfo"].GetCurrentUserExtensionProperties(); result = extension.firstName + " " + extension.lastName;
// result: INFOTABLE dataShape: "EntityList" let result = Users[User].GetGroups();
